title: Garcia lawsuit filed
description: Mother of a 14-year-old who died by suicide sues Character.AI, alleging the app contributed to her son's death. Filed in U.S. District Court, Florida.

title: Amended complaint
description: Garcia's legal team files an amended complaint adding detail to the original allegations.

title: Texas lawsuits filed
description: Two additional families in Texas sue Character.AI over alleged psychological harm and inappropriate content shown to minors.

title: Teen safety features
description: Character.AI announces a separate under-18 model, parental controls, and content filters, responding to lawsuits and public pressure.

title: Case settled
description: Garcia v. Character Technologies is settled out of court. Terms are not public. Similar settlements reached with related Colorado, New York, and Texas cases.
